2310240.name: Tank kingdoms
2310240.description:
The lastest updated changed game too much. so this game is planed to retire as Steam policy, and make new steam store page

Even though this game is in early access, changing a tank game into a medieval combat game would be considered a significant shift to the point where it would be deemed a different game, and Steam does not permit replacing a game that is already on sale.






Overworld
Players can visit villages on the world map to recruit soldiers and engage in battles against enemy armies in the field.


Battle
Players directly participate in 3D battles and can simultaneously control over a hundred allied soldiers.


Soldier tree
All soldiers have their own upgrade trees
